summary: Iteration 136 - Testing bundles architecture fix (PillarBundlesTab) + Dine catalog seed. All core features working. 15/15 backend tests passed. All 3 pillar managers (Dine, Care, Fit) correctly use PillarBundlesTab with canonical /api/bundles?pillar=X endpoint. Dine seed endpoint works and is idempotent.

minor.issue: Button shows 'Seed Dine Catalog (49 products)' but actual catalog has 48 products (confirmed by API returning total_catalog=48 and skipped=48 on 2nd run)

code_quality.issue: Legacy fetchData() at line 231 still calls old /api/care/bundles on component mount (dead code - result stored in bundles state but Bundles tab uses PillarBundlesTab). Lines 355/358/371 also have old CRUD endpoints that are dead code now.
code_quality.severity: LOW - does not affect functionality, just wastes API calls

code_quality.issue: Legacy fetchAllData() at line 119 still calls old /api/fit/bundles on component mount. Lines 334/337/352 also have old CRUD endpoints.

action_items: MINOR: Update DineManager.jsx button text from '49 products' to '48 products' to match actual catalog size
CLEANUP: Remove dead legacy bundle fetch code from CareManager.jsx (lines 231, 355, 358, 371) and FitManager.jsx (lines 119, 334, 337, 352) to complete the architecture migration
critical_code_review_comments: CareManager.jsx line 231: axios.get('/api/care/bundles') - OLD endpoint still called on mount, no longer needed since Bundles tab uses PillarBundlesTab
DineManager.jsx line 1895: Button text '(49 products)' should be '(48 products)' to match actual DINE_CATALOG size
seed_data_creation: Dine catalog was already seeded (48 products). On second run: 0 new seeded, 48 skipped (idempotent confirmed). Test bundle 'Test Dine Bundle' created and deleted via API. Care/Fit bundles already present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Architecture fix is complete and working. DineManager, CareManager, FitManager all use PillarBundlesTab with canonical /api/bundles?pillar=X endpoint. Dine catalog has 48 products seeded. The old fetchData() calls to /api/care/bundles and /api/fit/bundles still exist in component mount (dead code) but do NOT affect tab functionality. These are minor cleanup items.

dine_bundles_tab.evidence: PillarBundlesTab rendered, calls /api/bundles?pillar=dine, shows 7+ bundles, Add Bundle works

create_bundle_dine.evidence: Add Bundle modal opens, form fills, POST /api/bundles called, Bundle created! toast shown, count updated from 7 to 8

seed_dine_button.evidence: Seed button exists with data-testid='seed-dine-products-btn', clicking shows toast 'Dine catalog seeded: 0 new products, 48 already exist'

dine_product_count.evidence: API returns 48+ products for pillar=dine. Products tab shows 526 total dine products

canonical_api_bundles.evidence: GET /api/bundles?pillar=dine&active_only=false returns {bundles: [...], total, page, pages, pillar}

seed_idempotent.evidence: Second run returns seeded=0, skipped=48 (confirmed by both backend test and UI toast)
